_meta.description: Structured filtration reference keyed by topic. Used by get_filtration_reference tool. Skips chemical compatibility (handled by check_chemical) and escalation triggers (handled by check_safety).

fundamentals.title: Filtration Fundamentals
fundamentals.definition: Separation of particles from a fluid (liquid or gas) using a porous medium.

key_terms.micron: 1 µm = 0.001 mm. Human hair is ~70 µm. Bacteria ~0.2-0.45 µm. Visible haze ~15-20 µm.
key_terms.absolute_rating: 99.9% removal of particles at rated size
key_terms.nominal_rating: 60-90% removal of particles at rated size (varies by manufacturer)
key_terms.flow_rate: Volume per time — GPM (US), LPM, or m³/hr
key_terms.differential_pressure: Pressure drop across the filter, measured in psid
key_terms.dirt_holding_capacity: Amount of contaminant a filter can hold before changeout
key_terms.beta_ratio: Upstream particle count divided by downstream particle count at a given size. Higher beta = higher efficiency. Efficiency = (β-1)/β × 100%

filter_types.title: Filter Types by Mechanism and Media

depth.best_for: Pre-filtration, high dirt loads, deformable particles

surface_membrane.best_for: Final filtration, critical applications, rigid particles

bag.description: Large surface area, high flow, low cost

cartridge_construction.description: Yarn of twisted fibers wound around center core
Fibers treated with resin for rigidity

media_types.title: Filter Media: Max Temperatures and Chemical Compatibility
media_types.note: Max temps from V5 reference. For specific chemical compatibility use check_chemical tool.

media.chemical_resistance: Good for water, dilute acids/bases, alcohols. NOT for aromatic solvents, chlorinated solvents, oxidizers.
Good for aqueous. Limited chemical resistance.
Excellent — nearly all chemicals. NOT for molten alkali metals or elemental fluorine.
Excellent except chlorides at high temp, hot HCl, hot concentrated H2SO4

absolute_vs_nominal.title: Absolute vs Nominal Ratings

nominal.definition: Retention of ~90% at rated particle size

absolute.definition: Retention of 99.9%+ at rated particle size
absolute.use_cases: Sterile filtration, critical applications, validated processes

absolute_vs_nominal.rule_of_thumb: When in doubt for critical service, use absolute. Nominal is fine for pre-filtration ahead of a final absolute filter.

cartridge_flow_rates.title: Cartridge Flow Rates (Water @ 1 psid)
cartridge_flow_rates.note: Clean filter capacity. Size systems at 70-80% of max rated flow for longer life.
cartridge_flow_rates.sizing_formula: Number of cartridges = System Flow (GPM) / Flow per cartridge (GPM)
cartridge_flow_rates.utilization_rule: Use 50-70% of rated flow for longer service life

decision.reason: Will not deform; builds cake on surface

depth_vs_surface.title: Depth Filters vs Surface Filters Comparison

filtration_variables_impact.title: Impact of Operating Variables on Efficiency and Life

application:food_beverage.title: Food & Beverage Applications
application:food_beverage.industry_overview: Breweries, wineries, distilleries, dairy, soft drinks, bottled water. FDA and 3-A standards mandatory. NSF 61 required for potable water contact.

typical_specs.beer_wine: 0.45-1.0 µm membrane for sterile filtration; depth sheets (Filtrox) for upstream clarification
typical_specs.spirits_whisky: 0.5-1.0 µm depth sheets for polishing; membrane for final

application:food_beverage.recommended_products: Membrane (PES, PTFE), depth sheets (Filtrox is the primary brand for depth sheets — NOT Pall), sintered metal for culinary steam

application:pharmaceutical.title: Pharmaceutical / Biotech Applications
application:pharmaceutical.industry_overview: Sterile filtration, buffer prep, API processing, WFI (water for injection) systems. Validation required.

typical_specs.sterile_filtration: 0.2 µm absolute, validated, bacterial challenge tested (Pseudomonas diminuta)
typical_specs.prefiltration: 0.5-5 µm to protect final sterile filter

application:pharmaceutical.media_requirements: Absolute-rated PES or PTFE only. Never nominal for sterile. Never PVDF unless solvent service.

application:hydraulic.title: Hydraulic and Lube Oil Applications
application:hydraulic.industry_overview: Hydraulic systems, gearboxes, lube oil, turbine lube. ISO cleanliness targets drive specs.

typical_specs.change_interval: Based on ΔP or scheduled time

application:hydraulic.media_recommendations: Microglass depth for absolute rated, Pall Ultipleat HF for turbine lube, standard pleated for general hydraulic

application:oil_gas.title: Oil & Gas Applications
application:oil_gas.industry_overview: Upstream, midstream, and downstream oil and gas. Amine treating, glycol dehydration, condensate, sour water.

sub_applications.name: Acid Gas Sweetening (Amine)
sub_applications.recommended: Pall LLS or LLH coalescer (HC contamination is the root cause of amine foaming)

application:oil_gas.escalation_triggers: H2S, HF, NACE/sour service (MR0175), hydrogen service — always escalate to engineering

application:refinery.title: Refinery Applications
application:refinery.industry_overview: Refinery process streams. High temp, corrosive service, catalyst protection.
application:refinery.escalation_triggers: H2S, sour service, temperatures > 400°F, hydrogen — always escalate

application:water_treatment.title: Water Treatment Applications
application:water_treatment.industry_overview: Municipal water, wastewater, industrial process water, RO prefiltration.
application:water_treatment.regulatory: NSF 61 mandatory for potable water contact. State in every response for municipal applications.
application:water_treatment.recommended_media: Polypropylene for general service, PES for critical, activated carbon for taste/odor

application:compressed_air.title: Compressed Air Applications
application:compressed_air.industry_overview: Instrument air, process air, breathing air. Particulate + oil + water removal.
application:compressed_air.recommended_products: SPX/Hankison coalescers, Pall compressed air filters

application:chemical_processing.title: Chemical Processing Applications
application:chemical_processing.industry_overview: Solvents, acids, caustics, polymer processing, specialty chemicals.

typical_specs.media_selection_rule: Match media to chemical — PTFE for aggressive, 316SS for high temp, PP only for mild service

application:chemical_processing.escalation_triggers: Unknown chemical combinations, mixed solvents, concentration >50% — escalate for SDS review

application:hvac.title: HVAC Applications
application:hvac.industry_overview: Building HVAC, data centers, clean rooms, paint booth air filtration.

typical_specs.data_center: MERV 13-14 typical, pre + final filter stages

application:industrial.title: Industrial (General Process) Applications
application:industrial.industry_overview: General manufacturing plant applications that don't fit a specific vertical. Default bucket when the use case is 'cooling water', 'process water', 'general plant' without more specificity.
application:industrial.typical_approach: Start with 10-25 µm depth for bulk particle removal, add finer stages as needed based on specific process requirements.

sizing_questions.title: Key Specifications to Gather Before Recommending
questions: Fluid: type, viscosity, temperature, chemical composition?
Flow rate: normal operating, peak demand?
Cleanliness target: micron rating, ISO code, sterile?

troubleshooting:short_filter_life.title: Troubleshooting: Short Filter Life
checklist: Check upstream contamination levels — may need prefiltration
Verify filter rating matches application (too fine = premature loading)
Consider adding a coarser prefilter stage
Check for emulsions or gels that blind surface filters

troubleshooting:high_pressure_drop.title: Troubleshooting: High Pressure Drop
checklist: Undersized filter — increase surface area or parallel cartridges
Filter plugged — replace and investigate upstream source
Wrong media — verify chemical compatibility and rating

troubleshooting:poor_filtration.title: Troubleshooting: Poor Filtration
checklist: Filter bypass — check seals, o-rings, and installation
Wrong micron rating — step to finer filter
Particle type mismatch — try different media (depth vs surface)
